description: Honest track record + ensemble attribution. Reads every research file, computes ticker return + SPY-relative alpha vs entry price, aggregates by rating + critic_rating, AND tests whether ensemble disagreement signal predicts anything (consensus vs contested calls). Writes analytics/backtest_results.json.
